reasoning: Lactate clearance is the primary limiter. By focusing on over-under intervals, we address the 9.3% decline in power over longer durations. Your last ride showed a lower average wattage, indicating the need for more high-intensity work to prepare for the Alpine Loop's sustained climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6x (4 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W), sustained over-unders simulating the varying demands of the Alpine Loop climb.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
